{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = diamond (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] is as tough as a diamond.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
